article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.2. Comments on Proposed Metro 2050 Amendment Options in Response to Request by the Mayors 2026-03-10.pdf

briefs.title: Council to Vote on Sending Concerns About Proposed Metro 2050 Regional Growth Changes
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to vote on sending a letter to Metro Vancouver opposing four proposed changes to Metro 2050 — the regional plan that controls where urban growth happens. The proposed changes would make it easier to expand the Urban Containment Boundary (the line that separates urban development from rural and agricultural land), which Burnaby says could drive up costs and worsen urban sprawl.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the Metro Vancouver Board decision in April 2026 — changes could raise Development Cost Charges for builders.

key_dates.label: Metro 2050 amendment options comment period closes — Metro Vancouver
